# azion_custom_page (Resource)

Creates a Custom Page resource. Custom Pages allow you to define custom error pages for specific HTTP status codes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "azion_custom_page" "example" {
  custom_page = {
    name   = "My Custom Error Pages"
    active = true
    pages = [
      {
        code = "404"
        page = {
          type = "application"
          attributes = {
            connector = 12345
            ttl       = 60
            uri       = "/errors/404.html"
          }
        }
      },
      {
        code = "500"
        page = {
          type = "application"
          attributes = {
            connector = 12345
            ttl       = 60
            uri       = "/errors/500.html"
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `custom_page` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_page))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `last_updated` (String) Timestamp of the last Terraform update of the resource.

<a id="nestedatt--custom_page"></a>
### Nested Schema for `custom_page`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the custom page.
- `pages` (Attributes List) List of pages associated with the custom page. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_page--pages))

Optional:

- `active` (Boolean) Status of the custom page.

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) The custom page identifier.
- `last_editor` (String) The last editor of the custom page.
- `last_modified` (String) Last modified timestamp of the custom page.
- `product_version` (String) Product version of the custom page.

<a id="nestedatt--custom_page--pages"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pages`

Required:

- `code` (String) HTTP status code for the page. Valid values: `default`, `400`, `401`, `403`, `404`, `405`, `406`, `408`, `409`, `410`, `411`, `414`, `415`, `416`, `426`, `429`, `431`, `500`, `501`, `502`, `503`, `504`, `505`.
- `page` (Attributes) Page connector configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_page--pages--page))

<a id="nestedatt--custom_page--pages--page"></a>
### Nested Schema for `page`

Required:

- `type` (String) Type of the page connector.
- `attributes` (Attributes) Attributes of the page connector. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_page--pages--page--attributes))

<a id="nestedatt--custom_page--pages--page--attributes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `attributes`

Required:

- `connector` (Number) Connector ID (Application ID).

Optional:

- `ttl` (Number) Time to live for the page (in seconds).
- `uri` (String) URI for the page.
- `custom_status_code` (Number) Custom status code for the page.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import azion_custom_page.example custom_page_id
```
